feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Tom & Jerry were named, V for victory sign got popular & more July 19 in history Oneindia News

link.title: Tom & Jerry were named, V for victory sign got popular & more July 19 in history Oneindia News

entry.content:
We take you through time to witness the biggest events in history on this day. In this episode: Astronomer Johannes Kepler has insight on trajectory of planets, the Rosetta Stone is discovered which would help decode Egyptian hieroglyphics, Tom and Jerry are given their names, Winston Churchill uses the V for Victory sign and Apollo 11 enters Lunar orbit maneuvers
#ThisDayThatYear #History #TomJerry #Apollo11
entry.summary: We take you through time to witness the biggest events in history on this day. In this episode: Astronomer Johannes Kepler has insight on trajectory of planets, the Rosetta Stone is discovered which would help decode Egyptian hieroglyphics, Tom and Jerry are given their names, Winston Churchill uses the V for Victory sign and Apollo 11 enters Lunar orbit maneuvers #ThisDayThatYear #History #TomJerry #Apollo11

entry.title: Missouri Gov Says If Kids Get COVID-19 They’ll ‘Get Over It’

link.title: Missouri Gov Says If Kids Get COVID-19 They’ll ‘Get Over It’

entry.content:
The Republican governor of Missouri is pushing for children to return to school.
Gov. Mike Parson’s controversial comments came during a Friday interview on KFTK.
“These kids have got to get back to school… if they do get COVID-19, which they will — and they will when they go to school — they’re not going to the hospitals. They’re not going to have to sit in doctor’s offices. They’re going to go home and they’re going to get over it.”
While the symptoms of COVID-19 are generally more mild in children than adults…
…There have been many cases of serious illness and even deaths among juveniles.
An 8-year-old girl in North Carolina died in early June four days after testing positive for COVID-19.
A school-aged child in Oklahoma died this month of complications related to the disease.
As of Monday, a child no older than 5 became the youngest person to die from COVID-19 in MN.
entry.summary: The Republican governor of Missouri is pushing for children to return to school. Gov. Mike Parson’s controversial comments came during a Friday interview on KFTK. “These kids have got to get back to school… if they do get COVID-19, which they will — and they will when they go to school — they’re not going to the hospitals. They’re not going to have to sit in doctor’s offices. They’re going to go home and they’re going to get over it.” While the symptoms of COVID-19 are generally more mild in children than adults… …There have been many cases of serious illness and even deaths among juveniles. An 8-year-old girl in North Carolina died in early June four days after testing positive for COVID-19. A school-aged child in Oklahoma died this month of complications related to the disease. As of Monday, a child no older than 5 became the youngest person to die from COVID-19 in MN.

entry.title: Fakear : ‘Le son 3D est une expérience assez psychédélique’

link.title: Fakear : ‘Le son 3D est une expérience assez psychédélique’

entry.content:
Rencontre avec le beatmaker français Fakear à l’issue de son premier concert en son spatialisé lors d’une FIP 360 enregistrée le 29 juin 2020 à l’auditorium L-Acoustics, en partenariat avec Trax Magazine.
· Interview : Ghislain Chantepie
· Réalisation : Melike Balci
· Images et son : Melike Balci, Morgane Fougeri, Camille Garin
entry.summary: Rencontre avec le beatmaker français Fakear à l’issue de son premier concert en son spatialisé lors d’une FIP 360 enregistrée le 29 juin 2020 à l’auditorium L-Acoustics, en partenariat avec Trax Magazine. · Interview : Ghislain Chantepie · Réalisation : Melike Balci · Images et son : Melike Balci, Morgane Fougeri, Camille Garin

entry.title: La terrible sortie médiatique de Lionel Messi enflamme Barcelone, le sacre du Real Madrid fait les gros titres

link.title: La terrible sortie médiatique de Lionel Messi enflamme Barcelone, le sacre du Real Madrid fait les gros titres

entry.content: Les mots forts de La Pulga font trembler la presse catalane, le titre de la Casa Blanca fait grand bruit, et Marcus Rashford sauve Manchester United et fait la Une en Angleterre, voici votre revue de presse du 17 juillet 2020.
entry.summary: Les mots forts de La Pulga font trembler la presse catalane, le titre de la Casa Blanca fait grand bruit, et Marcus Rashford sauve Manchester United et fait la Une en Angleterre, voici votre revue de presse du 17 juillet 2020.

entry.title: Kevin Connolly Accused Of Rape

link.title: Kevin Connolly Accused Of Rape

entry.content:
Costume designer Gracie Cox has accused actor/director Kevin Connolly of sexual assault.
The allegations were published in The Daily Beast.
She alleges the ‘Entourage’ actor attacked her at a wrap party for his directorial debut “The Gardener of Eden.”
She alleges that Connelly pulled her into a booth, pulled down her pants, turned her around, and raped her.
She says Connolly came, he was not wearing a condom.
“He took a pillow off of a couch, threw it at me, and told me to ‘clean myself up.’"
Connelly said the encounter was consensual.
entry.summary: Costume designer Gracie Cox has accused actor/director Kevin Connolly of sexual assault. The allegations were published in The Daily Beast. She alleges the ‘Entourage’ actor attacked her at a wrap party for his directorial debut “The Gardener of Eden.” She alleges that Connelly pulled her into a booth, pulled down her pants, turned her around, and raped her. She says Connolly came, he was not wearing a condom. “He took a pillow off of a couch, threw it at me, and told me to ‘clean myself up.’" Connelly said the encounter was consensual.

entry.title: ‘Creí’, Piedra Firme, introducción (2003).

link.title: ‘Creí’, Piedra Firme, introducción (2003).

entry.content:
"Creí", Piedra Firme, introducción (2003).
"I believed", Piedra Firme, introduction (2003).
entry.summary: "Creí", Piedra Firme, introducción (2003). "I believed", Piedra Firme, introduction (2003).

entry.title: Car Accidentally Crashes Into Garage Door After Starting up

link.title: Car Accidentally Crashes Into Garage Door After Starting up

entry.content: The father of this boy wanted to make him sit in the driver’s seat once before he sold the car. He started the engine and was enjoying one last memory of sitting in the car. However, when his father asked him to turn the engine off, he removed his foot from the clutch, and the car ended up breaking in the garage door.
entry.summary: The father of this boy wanted to make him sit in the driver’s seat once before he sold the car. He started the engine and was enjoying one last memory of sitting in the car. However, when his father asked him to turn the engine off, he removed his foot from the clutch, and the car ended up breaking in the garage door.

entry.title: Sachin Pilot offered me Rs 35 crore to join BJP, says Congress MLA Oneindia Malayalam

link.title: Sachin Pilot offered me Rs 35 crore to join BJP, says Congress MLA Oneindia Malayalam

entry.content:
സച്ചിന്‍ പൈലറ്റിനെതിരെ ആരോപണവുമായി കോണ്‍ഗ്ര്‌സ് എംഎല്‍എ
രാജസ്ഥാന്‍ സര്‍ക്കാറില്‍ പ്രതിസന്ധി രൂക്ഷമായിരിക്കുന്നതിനിടെ സച്ചിന്‍ പൈലറ്റിനെതിരേ പുതിയ ആരോപണവുമായി കോണ്‍ഗ്രസ് എം എല്‍ എ. രാജ്യസഭാ തിരഞ്ഞെടുപ്പില്‍ ബിജെപിയെ പിന്തുണച്ചാല്‍ 35 കോടി നല്‍കാമെന്ന് സച്ചിന്‍ പൈലറ്റ് വാഗ്ദാനം നല്‍കിയതായാണ് കോണ്‍ഗ്രസ് എം എല്‍ എ ഗിരിരാജ് സിംഗ് മലിംഗ ആരോപണം ഉന്നയിച്ചത്.
entry.summary: സച്ചിന്‍ പൈലറ്റിനെതിരെ ആരോപണവുമായി കോണ്‍ഗ്ര്‌സ് എംഎല്‍എ രാജസ്ഥാന്‍ സര്‍ക്കാറില്‍ പ്രതിസന്ധി രൂക്ഷമായിരിക്കുന്നതിനിടെ സച്ചിന്‍ പൈലറ്റിനെതിരേ പുതിയ ആരോപണവുമായി കോണ്‍ഗ്രസ് എം എല്‍ എ. രാജ്യസഭാ തിരഞ്ഞെടുപ്പില്‍ ബിജെപിയെ പിന്തുണച്ചാല്‍ 35 കോടി നല്‍കാമെന്ന് സച്ചിന്‍ പൈലറ്റ് വാഗ്ദാനം നല്‍കിയതായാണ് കോണ്‍ഗ്രസ് എം എല്‍ എ ഗിരിരാജ് സിംഗ് മലിംഗ ആരോപണം ഉന്നയിച്ചത്.

entry.title: Jio Glass Explained in Tamil Jio Glass Price and Features Oneindia Tamil

link.title: Jio Glass Explained in Tamil Jio Glass Price and Features Oneindia Tamil

entry.content:
#JioGlass
#JioGlassPrice
Reliance Jio has announced a new product called Jio Glass. The new product is aimed at enhancing the virtual space by making it more interactive using 3D avatars, holographic content and even normal video conferencing features. The Jio Glass weighs just 75gms and comes with personalized audio
ரிலையன்ஸ் நிறுவனம் நேற்று தனது 43-வது ஆண்டு பொது கூட்டத்தில் கலப்பு ரியாலிட்டி ஸ்மார்ட் கிளாஸை அறிமுகம் செய்தது, குறிப்பிட்டு சொல்ல வேண்டும் என்றால், ஜியோ கிளாஸை அறிமுகம் செய்தது, இந்த கண்ணாடியில், ஒரு கேபிள் உள்ளது. அந்த கேபிள்ஸ் உதவியுடன் அதை உங்கள் ஸ்மார்ட்போன் உடன் இணைக்கமுடியும்.
entry.summary: #JioGlass #JioGlassPrice Reliance Jio has announced a new product called Jio Glass. The new product is aimed at enhancing the virtual space by making it more interactive using 3D avatars, holographic content and even normal video conferencing features. The Jio Glass weighs just 75gms and comes with personalized audio ரிலையன்ஸ் நிறுவனம் நேற்று தனது 43-வது ஆண்டு பொது கூட்டத்தில் கலப்பு ரியாலிட்டி ஸ்மார்ட் கிளாஸை அறிமுகம் செய்தது, குறிப்பிட்டு சொல்ல வேண்டும் என்றால், ஜியோ கிளாஸை அறிமுகம் செய்தது, இந்த கண்ணாடியில், ஒரு கேபிள் உள்ளது. அந்த கேபிள்ஸ் உதவியுடன் அதை உங்கள் ஸ்மார்ட்போன் உடன் இணைக்கமுடியும்.

entry.title: Ambulance Carrying Sushant Singh Rajput’s Body Was Changed?

link.title: Ambulance Carrying Sushant Singh Rajput’s Body Was Changed?

entry.content:
A new theory around Sushant Singh Rajput’s demise is going viral which claims that the ambulance carrying his body was changed midway.

entry.title: Coronavirus India: देश में मरीजों की संख्या 10.77 लाख पार, 38,902 नए केस वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus India: देश में मरीजों की संख्या 10.77 लाख पार, 38,902 नए केस वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The situation in Corona is becoming uncontrollable in the country … After America and Brazil, now the highest number of cases are being reported in India every day … Despite all efforts, the number of Covid-19 infected has crossed 1 million. , Over 38 thousand people have been found infected in the last 24 hours. This is the highest number of cases in a day
कोरोना के हालात देश में बेकाबू हो रहे है… अमेरिका और ब्राजील के बाद अब हर दिन में सबसे ज्यादा मामले भारत में सामने आ रहे हैं…तमाम प्रयासों के बावजूद Covid-19 संक्रमितों की संख्या 10 लाख के पार पहुंच चुकी है, पिछले 24 घंटों में 38 हजार से ज्यादा लोग संक्रमित पाए गए हैं. यह एक दिन में आए सर्वाधिक मामले हैं.
#Coronavirus #Covid19
entry.summary: The situation in Corona is becoming uncontrollable in the country … After America and Brazil, now the highest number of cases are being reported in India every day … Despite all efforts, the number of Covid-19 infected has crossed 1 million. , Over 38 thousand people have been found infected in the last 24 hours. This is the highest number of cases in a day कोरोना के हालात देश में बेकाबू हो रहे है… अमेरिका और ब्राजील के बाद अब हर दिन में सबसे ज्यादा मामले भारत में सामने आ रहे हैं…तमाम प्रयासों के बावजूद Covid-19 संक्रमितों की संख्या 10 लाख के पार पहुंच चुकी है, पिछले 24 घंटों में 38 हजार से ज्यादा लोग संक्रमित पाए गए हैं. यह एक दिन में आए सर्वाधिक मामले हैं. #Coronavirus #Covid19

entry.title: Coronavirus : Véran va ‘réenclencher la distribution de masques gratuits’

link.title: Coronavirus : Véran va ‘réenclencher la distribution de masques gratuits’

entry.content: « Nous allons réenclencher la distribution de masques gratuits à destination du public précaire », a annoncé le ministre de la Santé devant les députés lors des questions au gouvernement à l’Assemblée nationale. Alors que l’épidémie semble repartir en France, l’achat de protections représente un coût non négligeable notamment pour les familles.
entry.summary: « Nous allons réenclencher la distribution de masques gratuits à destination du public précaire », a annoncé le ministre de la Santé devant les députés lors des questions au gouvernement à l’Assemblée nationale. Alors que l’épidémie semble repartir en France, l’achat de protections représente un coût non négligeable notamment pour les familles.

entry.title: The 2nd Trailer #1 (2020) Casper Van Dien, Samaire Armstrong Action Movie HD

link.title: The 2nd Trailer #1 (2020) Casper Van Dien, Samaire Armstrong Action Movie HD

entry.content:
Trailer for The 2nd, starring Casper Van Dien, Samaire Armstrong, Ryan Phillippe, William Katt and Richard Burgi.
Secret-service agent Vic Davis (Ryan Phillippe) is on his way to pick up his estranged son, Shawn (Jack Griffo), from his college campus when he finds himself in the middle of a high-stakes terrorist operation. The daughter of a Supreme Court Justice (Lexi Simonsen) is the target and this armed faction will stop at nothing to kidnap her Vic quickly realizes that there’s no one coming to rescue them and must now use his entire set of skills to save her and his son from an incredibly dangerous and lethal situation.
entry.summary: Trailer for The 2nd, starring Casper Van Dien, Samaire Armstrong, Ryan Phillippe, William Katt and Richard Burgi. Secret-service agent Vic Davis (Ryan Phillippe) is on his way to pick up his estranged son, Shawn (Jack Griffo), from his college campus when he finds himself in the middle of a high-stakes terrorist operation. The daughter of a Supreme Court Justice (Lexi Simonsen) is the target and this armed faction will stop at nothing to kidnap her Vic quickly realizes that there’s no one coming to rescue them and must now use his entire set of skills to save her and his son from an incredibly dangerous and lethal situation.

entry.title: Bisnis Daur Ulang Sepeda Bekas Ditengah Pandemi

link.title: Bisnis Daur Ulang Sepeda Bekas Ditengah Pandemi

entry.content:
BLORA, KOMPAS.TV - Adhi Apriyanto, warga Desa Jepon, Kecamatan Jepon, Blora ini sejak 3 bulan lalu menekuni usaha kreatifnya, yaitu mendaur ulang sepeda bekas yang sudah tidak layak pakai dan rusak.
Awalnya Adhi yang sebelumnya memiliki CV Usaha Mandiri mulai kesulitan penghasilan akibat kebijakan dampak pandemi Covid-19. Namun ditengah kesulitan tersebut, Adhi sempat membaca adanya peluang dalam tren sepeda yang saat ini sedang digandrungi semua kalangan. Ia mulai melirik usaha sepeda minion alias sepeda lama yang di daur ulang. Sembari belajar detail cara mendaur ulang sepeda dengan menonton tutorial dari media sosial dan youtube.
Satu persatu sepeda rusak dan berkarat dibersihkan dari karat lalu dicat ulang, termasuk kelengkapan sepeda yang masih bisa digunakan lagi dicat ulang.
Sejak 3 bulan lalu berkreasi mendaur ulang sepeda lama dan rusak, Adhi bersama beberapa orang tetangganya sudah membuat belasan sepeda minion yang bagus. Cukup dipasarkan di media sosial, kini sepeda minion Adhi yang dihargai antara 4 hingga 5 juta rupiah itu, mampu terjual dari kota besar di Jawa hingga ke Kalimantan. Konsumen juga dapat memesan sesuai dengan selera.
Adhi tak menyangka jika kini dirinya memiliki usaha kreatif daur ulang sepeda rongsokan. Kini berkat kejeliannya membaca peluang usaha, Adhi mampu mendapatkan penghasilan di tengah pandemi Covid-19 meski tak harus banyak keluar rumah.
#Covid-19 #SepedaMinion #DaurUlangSepeda
entry.summary: BLORA, KOMPAS.TV - Adhi Apriyanto, warga Desa Jepon, Kecamatan Jepon, Blora ini sejak 3 bulan lalu menekuni usaha kreatifnya, yaitu mendaur ulang sepeda bekas yang sudah tidak layak pakai dan rusak. Awalnya Adhi yang sebelumnya memiliki CV Usaha Mandiri mulai kesulitan penghasilan akibat kebijakan dampak pandemi Covid-19. Namun ditengah kesulitan tersebut, Adhi sempat membaca adanya peluang dalam tren sepeda yang saat ini sedang digandrungi semua kalangan. Ia mulai melirik usaha sepeda minion alias sepeda lama yang di daur ulang. Sembari belajar detail cara mendaur ulang sepeda dengan menonton tutorial dari media sosial dan youtube. Satu persatu sepeda rusak dan berkarat dibersihkan dari karat lalu dicat ulang, termasuk kelengkapan sepeda yang masih bisa digunakan lagi dicat ulang. Sejak 3 bulan lalu berkreasi mendaur ulang sepeda lama dan rusak, Adhi bersama beberapa orang tetangganya sudah membuat belasan sepeda minion yang bagus. Cukup dipasarkan di media sosial, kini sepeda minion Adhi yang dihargai antara 4 hingga 5 juta rupiah itu, mampu terjual dari kota besar di Jawa hingga ke Kalimantan. Konsumen juga dapat memesan sesuai dengan selera. Adhi tak menyangka jika kini dirinya memiliki usaha kreatif daur ulang sepeda rongsokan. Kini berkat kejeliannya membaca peluang usaha, Adhi mampu mendapatkan penghasilan di tengah pandemi Covid-19 meski tak harus banyak keluar rumah. #Covid-19 #SepedaMinion #DaurUlangSepeda

entry.title: Twin Babies Race Against Each Other As They Crawl To Their Mom

link.title: Twin Babies Race Against Each Other As They Crawl To Their Mom

entry.content: These cute baby twins were crawling towards their mother. When one of the babies started to crawl forward faster, the other baby sped up as their mother cheered them both on, setting off a race. Finally, it concluded when one of them crawled to the carpet at the end, and both babies giggled as their mom celebrated the champion crawler.
entry.summary: These cute baby twins were crawling towards their mother. When one of the babies started to crawl forward faster, the other baby sped up as their mother cheered them both on, setting off a race. Finally, it concluded when one of them crawled to the carpet at the end, and both babies giggled as their mom celebrated the champion crawler.

entry.title: Jaylen Brown Nails Full-Court Shot From Opposite Three-Point Line

link.title: Jaylen Brown Nails Full-Court Shot From Opposite Three-Point Line

entry.content: Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown shows off zero rust after nailing a full-court three-point shot from the opposite three-point line.
entry.summary: Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown shows off zero rust after nailing a full-court three-point shot from the opposite three-point line.

entry.content:

Arino’s Challenge… "Yumeshinbo’s Ultimate Triple Challenge
Just before the release of Game Center CX THE MOVIE… announcement
Turn around and there he is… in Dragon One, Zoom 909, and Doki-Doki Penguin Land.
